generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor speed and current state"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorStateDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringServoPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering servo position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringServoPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring overall vehicle state (position, velocity, etc.)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance MotorStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorStateSensor
]

instance SteeringServoPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoPositionSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point cloud data after serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonDataProcessing
]

instance MotorStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor state data including speed and current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppRealTimeControl
]

instance SteeringServoPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering servo position data for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringServoPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppRealTimeControl
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including position and velocity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Front-end data collection component for sensor data"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Software component for clustering and tracking objects from LiDAR data"
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Performs serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions per ISO 23247 standard"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller (VESCs) managing motor speed via precise voltage signals"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity containing 3D Visualization and Control Panel sub-components for monitoring and management"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity handling data management and control mechanisms"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity managing sensor/actuator data pre-processing, actuation, and device communication, including Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GPU-accelerated processing SDK for real-time data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware for inter-component communication via ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance PythonDataProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python scripts for data processing and clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance CppRealTimeControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ modules for real-time control of actuators"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-based design and simulation of ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving path, detected object tracks; UI for viewing, saving, and generating reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedPathVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computations to cloud for lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance, and actuation commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation, ActuationCommandProcessing
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables/disables ACC, sets desired speed, issues emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data for operator monitoring"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected driving path based on sensor data"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Display of detected object tracks from LiDAR data"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate and save vehicle data reports for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set target speed for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Initiate emergency braking command to stop vehicle immediately"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActuationCommandProcessing : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Processing of actuation commands for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UserEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, PhysicalTwinEntity, VedderElectronicSpeedController, LiDARSensor, MotorStateSensor, SteeringServoPositionSensor, VehicleStateSensor, DataCollectingFE, PointCloudClusteringComponent, ISO23247DataTranslationComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the ACC Controlling FE are serialized and converted by the Data Translation component, transmitted via ROS2 network to the Actuation FE, which interfaces with physical actuators (motor, steering servo). Inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi UDP for command delivery."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for device coordination to enable computation offloading, as dictated by hardware limitations; while safety-critical vehicular standards typically mandate stricter synchronization (<100 ms), the system adheres to 100 ms due to current hardware constraints."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA guidelines, implementing Software Components as ROS2 packages where each Functional Entity (FE) is encapsulated within individual ROS2 nodes. Entities (User, Digital Twin, Physical Twin) are deployed on separate hardware, with ROS2 serving as the middleware for inter-component communication. The Physical Twin Entity's expanded role, hosting both resource-specific and general automotive functions, represents a significant architectural deviation from ISO 23247 standards."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components uses ROS2 middleware; inter-entity communication occurs over Wi-Fi network using UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to ISO 23247:2021 standard for manufacturing, which comprises four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. Part 2 defines an entity-based reference architecture where Observable Manufacturing Elements (OMEs) are represented by Digital Twin Entities, with Data Collection and Device Control Entities handling data interaction, and User Entities providing interfaces for monitoring and control. Functional Entities (FEs) within each entity perform specific tasks such as data transformation, actuation, and user interfacing, with implementation choices like OPC Unified Architecture not prescribed by the standard."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Applies ISO 26262-1:2018 functional safety standards for road vehicles, including risk assessment, safety goals, and validation processes, alongside ISO 15622:2018 performance requirements and test procedures for Adaptive Cruise Control systems to ensure safety-critical operational integrity."
]
